title: Settings
description: Configure the language model used for readings — right here, no environment variables or config files needed.

section.llmHint: It powers the reading layer (conversation recaps, people analysis, reviews). Leave it off to keep only the factual record, with no readings.
section.whisperHint: The local model that turns recordings into text — the source of the factual record. Nothing leaves your machine.

apiKey.label: Anthropic API key
apiKey.placeholderSet: Already set (leave blank to keep it)
apiKey.hint: Stored only on this machine, in plain text in config.json; sent over local loopback.

whisperModel.label: Model size
whisperModel.hint: Larger is more accurate but slower and heavier; small or medium is a good pick for Chinese.

whisperDevice.label: Device
whisperDevice.hint: cpu runs anywhere; cuda needs an NVIDIA GPU with CUDA; auto tries cuda and falls back to cpu.
whisperDevice.auto: Auto (try CUDA, fall back to CPU)

whisperRestartHint: Transcription model changes take effect on next launch (the transcriber is built at startup, not hot-reloaded).
envOverride: Overridden by an environment variable; changes here won't take effect.
saved: Saved. It takes effect on your next reading.
failed: Couldn't save. Please try again in a moment.
